Wei Ying didn’t expect to enter a weird… something-with-benefits-plus-power-play with the captain of the Gusu basketball team. He’s not sure if it’s worth it.

Pran flies out to Singapore, and Pat misses him. Terribly.

Pat's door was locked. Pran expected as much, but it still stung.

And maybe Pran was too drunk to know when to give up.
